action.reasoning: Observation: The initial model achieved very low accuracy (0.01) which indicates severe catastrophic forgetting - the model is essentially making random predictions. The training approach of simply continuing to train on new tasks without any continual learning techniques is not working. Analysis: The model is overwriting knowledge from previous tasks when learning new ones. I need to implement a proper continual learning strategy to prevent catastrophic forgetting. Decision: I'll implement an Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) approach which adds a penalty term to preserve important weights from previous tasks. This should help maintain performance on earlier tasks while learning new ones.
